I tried her SSR wheel and it will deal 8 damage to the frontmost enemy and the back and then inflict falter on both hit after dealing damage, which then stays on them after. If you use her SSR wheel with her the instance of 8 damage is buffed since her own ult applies the debuff which then amplifies the 8 damage into 10 and applies it after which leads to 22 total damage
Her common wheel though,  If its a strike card that deals AOE like 24's 2 cost it still hits all regardless. Tincts strike card gets affected by it too which kinda wastes the second hit
